description: Install and configure the Claude Code CLI in your workspace.

variables.name: agent_id
variables.description: The ID of a Coder agent.

variables.name: anthropic_api_key
variables.description: API key passed to Claude Code via the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var.

variables.name: claude_binary_path
variables.description: Directory where the Claude Code binary is located.

variables.name: claude_code_version
variables.description: The version of Claude Code to install.

variables.name: disable_autoupdater
variables.description: Disable Claude Code automatic updates. When true, Claude Code will stay on the installed version.

variables.name: enable_ai_gateway
variables.description: Use AI Gateway for Claude Code. https://coder.com/docs/ai-coder/ai-gateway

variables.name: icon
variables.description: The icon to use for the app.

variables.name: mcp
variables.description: JSON-encoded MCP server configurations for Claude Code.

variables.name: model
variables.description: Default model for Claude Code via ANTHROPIC_MODEL env var.

variables.name: post_install_script
variables.description: Custom script to run after installing Claude Code.

variables.name: pre_install_script
variables.description: Custom script to run before installing Claude Code.
